# comfyui_voxel_to_mesh (Resource)

ComfyUI VoxelToMesh node [3d] Source: comfy_extras/nodes_hunyuan3d.py:451 (v3_extras).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `algorithm` (String) Input: COMBO.
- `threshold` (Number) Input: FLOAT. Default: 0.6. Allowed range: -1 to 1. Step: 0.01.
- `voxel` (String) Input: VOXEL. Link input.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance.
- `mesh_output` (String) Output: MESH (slot 0).
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type.
